items.title: Raffle winner thrilled to claim a $1 million Picasso with a $117 ticket
items.summary: "How do I check that it's not a hoax?" said Ari Hodara. The Parisian art enthusiast could not believe his luck when he found out he'd won a Pablo Picasso painting worth $1 million.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Constitution Amendment Bill on delimitation a biased move by Centre, alleges TVK chief Vijay
items.summary: Mr. Vijay, in a social media post, demanded the Bill be withdrawn and that the status quo be maintained.

items.title: AA and BSM ordered to refund learner drivers for hidden fees
items.summary: The owner of the driving schools has been fined for failing to disclose fees upfront online.
